description_long: This oven features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black exterior and a slightly angled front control panel. The control panel is equipped with four metallic knobs, symmetrically arranged on either side of a central dark display or panel area. The oven's body is rectangular with clean, sharp edges and a flat top surface, giving it a robust and minimalist appearance. The front face is uninterrupted except for the control panel, with no visible handles or windows on the door. The sides and back are plain, with no visible seams, vents, or additional features. The overall look is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban environments or modern kitchens.
description: A modern, black oven with a metallic control panel featuring four knobs and a central display, characterized by a minimalist, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic control panel with four knobs and a central dark display, with a smooth, uninterrupted black door below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, solid black side and the angled top edge of the control panel with protruding knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a completely flat, featureless black surface with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain black side and the angled control panel edge with visible knobs.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a horizontal strip at the top front of the oven, featuring four round metallic knobs, two on each side, symmetrically placed. The center of the panel is a dark, rectangular area that may serve as a display or touch interface. There are no visible labels, buttons, or digital screens, and the design is minimalistic with a focus on symmetry and simplicity.
attribute_door_handle_type: No visible external door handle; the design appears to have an integrated or concealed handle, possibly along the top edge of the door, maintaining a flush and minimalist appearance.
